title: dorycnium suffruticosum var. herbaceum
intro: Dorycnium suffruticosum var. herbaceum, also known as the dwarf jointed clover, is a perennial plant species within the pea family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Dorycnium suffruticosum var. herbaceum include its ability to help manage urinary issues, alleviate symptoms of kidney stones, and support overall digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots can be used to make teas, infusions, or dried extracts to harness its medicinal properties.
